description: Black's corner still has some endgame left. White to get the best result.
sgf:

(;W[br];B[ar]
(;W[bs];B[cr]TR[ao]TR[es]C[Great! Now Black has to answer both dames inside his own territory to prevent seki and you kept sente.RIGHT])
(;W[cs];B[cr]C[Now Black only has to answer one of the dames inside his own territory. You can do better.]TR[es]TR[ao])
(;W[as];B[bs]C[Now Black doesn't need to answer neither of the triangled dames. You can do better.]TR[ao]TR[es]))
